SEARCH
Package neqsim.standards.oilquality

Class Standard_EN116

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.NamedBaseClass
neqsim.standards.Standard
neqsim.standards.oilquality.Standard_EN116
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, StandardInterface, NamedInterface
public class Standard_EN116 extends Standard
Estimated Cold Filter Plugging Point (CFPP) - EN 116 (screening correlation).

The CFPP is the highest temperature at which a given volume of fuel fails to pass through a standardised filtration device within a specified time when cooled. It characterises the low-temperature operability of diesel and heating oils and is widely used in European specifications.

This class returns an estimate, not a laboratory measurement. For untreated middle distillates the CFPP closely tracks the cloud point (wax appearance temperature), which is obtained internally from Standard_ASTM_D2500: 

 
 CFPP[C] = cloudPoint[C] + offset

The default offset is 0.0 C (CFPP equal to cloud point). For untreated fuels the CFPP is commonly within a few degrees of the cloud point; cold-flow additives can depress the CFPP well below the cloud point, in which case the offset should be set from response testing. The offset is configurable. For rigorous work, calibrate against EN 116 laboratory data.

Usage example: 

 
 Standard_EN116 cfpp = new Standard_EN116(dieselFluid);
 cfpp.setOffset(-2.0);
 cfpp.calculate();
 double cfppC = cfpp.getValue("CFPP", "C");
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    • setOffset

      public void setOffset(double offset)
      Sets the offset (in Celsius) added to the cloud point to estimate the CFPP.
      Parameters:
      offset - offset in Celsius (default 0.0)

    • getOffset

      public double getOffset()
      Gets the offset (in Celsius) currently applied to the cloud point.
      Returns:
      the offset in Celsius

    • setMaxCfppSpec

      public void setMaxCfppSpec(double maxCfpp, String maxCfppUnit)
      Sets an optional maximum CFPP specification limit used by isOnSpec().
      Parameters:
      maxCfpp - maximum allowed CFPP
      maxCfppUnit - temperature unit, one of "C", "K", "F", "R"

    • clearMaxCfppSpec

      public void clearMaxCfppSpec()
      Clears any previously configured maximum CFPP specification limit.

    • convertTempFromC

      private double convertTempFromC(double valueC, String unit)
      Converts a temperature from Celsius to the requested unit.
      Parameters:
      valueC - temperature value in Celsius (may be NaN)
      unit - target unit, one of "C", "K", "F", "R"
      Returns:
      the converted temperature, or the Celsius value if the unit is unrecognised

    • convertTempToC

      private double convertTempToC(double value, String unit)
      Converts a temperature in the supplied unit to Celsius.
      Parameters:
      value - temperature value
      unit - source unit, one of "C", "K", "F", "R"
      Returns:
      the temperature in Celsius
